requests.prompt: One realistic full-frame start image for a one-take product ad. Use reference image 1 as the real product identity lock; preserve the portable LED lamp’s exact shape, colors, material, packaging, labels, and visible marks. Full-scene start frame, not a product-only packshot. The physical tabletop and backdrop fill the canvas edge to edge with no inner frame, border, inset, poster, or black/white margins; no central vertical rectangle. Scene: premium commercial tabletop studio. The lamp sits centered at plausible scale and orientation on a matte dark stone tabletop, straight-on composition. Background: deep charcoal, smooth, clean negative space. Lighting: soft diffused key from above-left with subtle rim; low ambient. The lamp is powered off in this first frame. No hand or person visible. No extra props, captions, UI, text, logos, or watermarks.
requests.negative_prompt: No captions, subtitles, watermark, UI, fake logo, random letters, extra fingers, warped hands, blurry product, wrong product, product-only packshot, empty background, inner frame, border, poster, inset image, image inside an image, black margins, dark outer margins, central vertical rectangle, photo within a photo, matted print.
